name: Massachusetts Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Sift dry ingredients into a mixing bowl.
3. Add egg, milk, and melted shortening. Stir until blended; do not overbeat.
4. Grease an 8-inch square pan or iron skillet.
5. Heat on the stovetop and pour in batter.
6. Bake in the oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
Serves 8 to 10.
